name: Eat the world
author: Poki
description: Eat everything you see to grow! Your aim is to get bigger by eating everything from dirt to people. Try different maps like the school, candy land and forest. You'd be surprised how much you can eat, and how big it will make you! Check out your rank on the online leaderboard too! You can also sell the blocks you already ate to upgrade, this way you can increase your speed and other stats! How to play Eat The World? Movement: WASD or arrow keys Jump: Spacebar Eat: Left mouse button Throw: E Who created Eat The World? Eat The World is created by Onrush Studio. Play their other games on Poki: Tribals.io , Venge.io , Arcane Archer , Jungle Friends , MagicLand.io , Shipo.io , and Burger Bounty ! How can I play Eat The World for free? You can play Eat The World for free on Poki. Can I play Eat The World on mobile devices and desktop? Eat The World can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Eat The World with my friend? Yes! Eat The World is a single or local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same computer!
